Task id: `BLACK-5036e0095a`
Title: Capture Blackdog snapshot, result, and supervisor fixtures for Emacs tests
Objective: Emacs workbench foundation
Epic: Emacs workbench for Blackdog
Lane: Emacs fixtures
Wave: 0
Priority: P1
Risk: low
Domains: results, events, inbox, testing

Why it matters: The Emacs package needs stable local fixtures so ERT can validate buffers and parsers without depending on live backlog state.
Evidence: Blackdog already emits rich snapshot, result, and supervisor JSON plus artifact trees that can seed fixture-driven tests.
Safe first slice: Harvest representative snapshot/result/run payloads into extensions/emacs/test/fixtures and add helper code to load them during ERT runs.

Target paths:
- extensions/emacs/test/
- .git/blackdog/task-results/
- .git/blackdog/supervisor-runs/

Docs to review:
- AGENTS.md
- docs/INDEX.md
- docs/ARCHITECTURE.md
- docs/CLI.md
- docs/FILE_FORMATS.md

Checks to run if you change behavior:
- make test
- emacs -Q --batch -L extensions/emacs -L extensions/emacs/test -l extensions/emacs/test/blackdog-test.el -f ert-run-tests-batch-and-exit
